task_completion.description: Verify that the YDBGui application is open and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The YDBGui application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the ^TIU(8925.1) global in YDBGui.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The YDBGui interface shows the global ^TIU(8925.1) being accessed, searched, or viewed in the database tree.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent inspected the zero-nodes of the global entries to identify the 'Type'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: YDBGui shows the expanded tree for ^TIU(8925.1) revealing IENs and their '0' nodes, displaying caret-delimited strings where the agent can check the 4th piece for 'TL'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report file tiu_titles_report.txt was created in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is shown saving a file named 'tiu_titles_report.txt' to '/home/ga/Documents/', or a file manager/terminal shows the file exists in that path.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report contains at least 5 distinct 'Title' entries in the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The open text file or terminal output shows at least 5 lines formatted as 'IEN | NAME | TL' (e.g., '12 | PROGRESS NOTE | TL').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used YDBGui to inspect the database rather than using terminal commands or scripts to extract the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the YDBGui interface to browse the ^TIU(8925.1) global, rather than terminal windows running MUMPS or Python extraction scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent extracted data by looking at the actual database entries.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen cross-referencing the YDBGui window with the text editor, manually transcribing or copying the IEN, NAME, and TYPE from the database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created and saved the text file at the specified path.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) is shown actively saving the file to /home/ga/Documents/tiu_titles_report.txt, rather than just typing text into a temporary buffer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target report path: /home/ga/Documents/tiu_titles_report.txt. Target global: ^TIU(8925.1). Minimum required entries: 5. Required format per line: 'IEN | NAME | TYPE' (where TYPE must be 'TL' for Titles). The 'Type' is the 4th piece of the zero-node (^TIU(8925.1,IEN,0)).
